# domain.map { #app.domain.map }

`domain.map`

Geospatial map helper utilities and vector boundary processing.

Manages geographic center metric fallbacks, handles tiler error HTML widgets, 
and slices, processes, and packs shapefiles into interactive ipyleaflet 
GeoJSON layout layers.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [build_region_layer](#app.domain.map.build_region_layer) | Build an interactive vector boundary layout layer for a specific region. |
| [get_map_error_html](#app.domain.map.get_map_error_html) | Generate fallback HTML widgets based on active raster tiler states from TiTiler API. |
| [get_region_gdf](#app.domain.map.get_region_gdf) | Filter the global subregions layer by specified geographic regions. |
| [load_subregion_boundaries](#app.domain.map.load_subregion_boundaries) | Load and simplify ecological shapefile data in WGS84 (EPSG:4326). |
| [zoom_from_span](#app.domain.map.zoom_from_span) | Calculate an ideal interactive map zoom factor using geographic coordinate spans. |

### build_region_layer { #app.domain.map.build_region_layer }

```python
domain.map.build_region_layer(region_name)
```

Build an interactive vector boundary layout layer for a specific region.

Precomputes centroids, geographic spans, and viewport bounding matrices 
for each feature to support responsive hover maps and hover controls.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name        | Type   | Description                                            | Default    |
|-------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| region_name | str    | The name of the target region to process and assemble. | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name          | Type          | Description                                                        |
|---------------|---------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------|
| layer         | GeoJSON       | The vector map layer styled with default and active hover rules.   |
| hover_card    | HTML          | An HTML widget element displaying contextual subregion attributes. |
| hover_control | WidgetControl | The leaflet control interface wrapping the hover card node.        |

### get_map_error_html { #app.domain.map.get_map_error_html }

```python
domain.map.get_map_error_html(status)
```

Generate fallback HTML widgets based on active raster tiler states from TiTiler API.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                                                                       | Default    |
|--------|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| status | str    | The current status flag identifier ('missing', 'loading', 'tiler_starting', 'tiler_unavailable'). | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                                       |
|--------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | HTML   | An ipywidgets HTML container holding user-facing status messages. |

### get_region_gdf { #app.domain.map.get_region_gdf }

```python
domain.map.get_region_gdf(region)
```

Filter the global subregions layer by specified geographic regions.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                                   | Default    |
|--------|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| region | str    | The region identifier key ('Canada', 'Lower48', or 'Alaska'). | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                                                |
|--------|------------------|------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | gpd.GeoDataFrame | The subset of subregion rows matching the regional filter. |

### load_subregion_boundaries { #app.domain.map.load_subregion_boundaries }

```python
domain.map.load_subregion_boundaries()
```

Load and simplify ecological shapefile data in WGS84 (EPSG:4326).

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                             |
|--------|------------------|-----------------------------------------|
|        | gpd.GeoDataFrame | Simplified subregion boundary polygons. |

### zoom_from_span { #app.domain.map.zoom_from_span }

```python
domain.map.zoom_from_span(span_x, span_y)
```

Calculate an ideal interactive map zoom factor using geographic coordinate spans.

Normalizes vertical height aspects and evaluates maximum layout widths 
to map raw decimal dimensions onto hardcoded zoom levels.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                                 | Default    |
|--------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| span_x | float  | The maximum horizontal bounding dimension (longitude span). | _required_ |
| span_y | float  | The maximum vertical bounding dimension (latitude span).    | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                                             |
|--------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | float  | The computed leaf-let map zoom factor integer or decimal approximation. |
